title: hieracium subatriceps
intro: Hieracium subatriceps is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion-like genus Hieracium, commonly known as hawkweed. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is rich in flavonoids and other bioactive compounds, which are believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, contributing to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Hieracium subatticeps is often used as a tincture or tea, and it can also be consumed as a dietary supplement.
